subject.描述: 9:16 vertical — a 3x3 grid collage (nine images) forming a [series_style] portrait photoshoot series. Each frame features the same [subject_type], maintaining [required_keyword] and 100% consistency in facial features, proportions, hairstyle, and identity across all nine shots. Natural, ultra-realistic skin texture, no retouching, no smoothing

特征: 九张图为同一人物，必须保持 [required_keyword]
maintaining 100% consistency in facial features, proportions, hairstyle, and identity
same hairstyle in all nine shots
same outfit in all nine images

构图: balanced spacing and consistent visual rhythm across all panels

typography.排版逻辑: Cosplay 海报格式模板；允许封面式图文排版，但核心主体必须始终保持 [required_keyword]。以后调用该模板时，生成提示词必须保留关键词‘100% 一致性’

层级.字体: 高对比纤细衬线体或现代中文宋体
中等字重黑体或衬线体

typography.文字规则: 模板关键词中必须携带‘100% 一致性’，调用时也必须保留该关键词

defaults.poster_style: 韩系偶像写真海报 / photobook collage poster
defaults.makeup_style: Clean idol-style minimal makeup, soft glow, subtle imperfections
defaults.skin_texture: Natural, ultra-realistic skin texture, no retouching, no smoothing
defaults.hair_style: long, voluminous dark hair, slightly tousled, consistent across all frames
defaults.outfit_style: cohesive Korean idol photoshoot styling — white shirt + short bottoms, same outfit across all frames
defaults.background_scene: minimal studio or simple indoor environment, plain wall, soft window light, clean background
defaults.tagline_text: 自然、亲密、柔和的九宫格写真
defaults.mid_center_pose: close-up direct eye contact gentle smile
defaults.bottom_center_pose: back partially turned looking over shoulder
defaults.bottom_right_pose: standing close to frame soft expression
